text.title: Headroom Cost Model Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-resources
step.action: Enumerate every critical resource. Skip nothing.

step.name: compute-utilisation-p95-30d
step.action: Per resource, compute p95 over trailing 30 days. Calc headroom %.

step.name: set-alerts
step.note: Gate: If any resource < 30% headroom, OPEN re-provision ticket now.

step.name: build-quarterly-projection
step.action: Project next-quarter demand delta. Multiply by unit cost. Share with finance.

step.name: anomaly-watch
step.action: Monitor monthly deviation. Auto-open investigation on >30%.
